Circuit tracing is being framed as an AI microscope for planning, hallucination, jailbreak, and unfaithful-reasoning mechanisms.
external_attention_inputs.source: Anthropic tracing thoughts of a large language model

external_attention_inputs.signal: Open interpretability artifacts increase demand for reproducible feature/circuit evidence rather than private model-internal claims.
Frontier labs are making agent monitoring a safety-case layer, including coverage, severity, human escalation, privacy, and limitations.
METR red-teaming found monitor coverage and evasion concerns, making adversarial falsification central to monitor claims.
Enterprise agent security is moving toward high-fidelity telemetry, pre-deployment red-teaming, hard-example generation, and online detection.
Production memory systems now expose saved-memory and chat-history controls, making consent, sensitivity, and deletion evidence user-visible.
Agent memory is framed as a write-manage-read loop with privacy governance, contradiction handling, and learned forgetting as open challenges.
external_attention_inputs.source: Memory for Autonomous LLM Agents survey

external_attention_inputs.signal: Memory evaluation now explicitly balances narrative utility, privacy preservation, cost, and forgetting policies.
external_attention_inputs.source: Forgetful but Faithful privacy-aware memory benchmark

external_attention_inputs.signal: Interactive world models make spatial simulation highly visible while their limitations require explicit fidelity and duration boundaries.
Physical AI platforms are positioning world foundation models as reusable simulation/data engines for robots and autonomous systems.
Autonomous-driving simulation is using world models for rare counterfactual scenarios and multimodal sensor outputs, which maps to state-diff receipts.

external_attention_inputs.signal: Persistent memory can act as a delayed attack surface where poisoned memories are written, retrieved later, and steer future agent actions.
Governed mutation systems can derive execution authority from structured proof objects, consensus, ephemeral execution identity, and evidence chains rather than standing credentials.
Dense verifier-grounded process rewards address sparse outcome-credit problems in long-horizon agentic reasoning when intermediate actions can be objectively checked.
Belief-aware process supervision targets partially observable long-horizon agents by making belief drift and feedback consistency part of credit assignment.
Tool poisoning in realistic MCP settings keeps tool metadata, manifests, and untrusted tool outputs in the agent-security frontier.

external_attention_inputs.signal: Research-agent evaluation is moving toward end-to-end paper replication with hierarchical rubrics, artifact execution, and judge validation.
Scientific reproducibility benchmarks measure whether agents can rerun published studies from code/data with task levels and parallel evaluation.
Data-driven scientific discovery agents need individual workflow-task evaluation, executable programs, costs, and contamination mitigation before end-to-end claims.
Scientific visualization agents need multi-step analysis benchmarks with deterministic, code, rule, image, case-specific, human, and LLM evaluator agreement.
Real computer-use agents need setup, execution-based evaluation, cross-app workflows, and GUI grounding evidence across operating systems.
Mobile agents need dynamic task parameterization, initialization/success/teardown logic, and robustness to task variations.
Multimodal web agents need visually grounded tasks where image-text interpretation and website action traces are evaluated together.
Tool-using LLM agents need exploit opportunities, shortcut detection, and environmental hardening measured directly.
Evaluation integrity for ML-engineering agents must measure evaluator tampering, train/test leakage, file-access logs, and trusted-reference grading.
Terminal-agent environments can be task-specifically reward-hackable, so benchmark fixtures need exploit taxonomy and monitorability receipts.
Static benchmarks face saturation and contamination; dynamic/adaptive benchmark structures and uncertainty estimates are becoming more salient.

actual_substrate_science_multimodal_benc.projection_contract: Project these only as synthetic replay receipts: research_replication_rubric_artifact_replay, scientific_data_figure_claim_lineage_replay, multimodal_gui_affordance_state_grounding_replay, and agent_benchmark_integrity_anti_gaming_replay folded under proof_diagnostic_evidence_spine, mission_transaction_work_spine, agent_route_observability_runtime, and external_boundary_anti_corruption_runtime.

projection_effect.materialization_update: The high-novelty scout now includes four additional synthetic-only public-safe compounds: mechanistic interpretability circuit-attribution replay, agent monitor red-team/falsification replay, personal agent memory consent/revocation replay, and spatial world-model counterfactual simulation replay. No public roots, private model internals, live agent traffic, real user memory, private video/sensor data, robot/AV operation, or product/benchmark claims were used as authority.
mechanical_change_for_next_public_builde: Treat source_refs as resolver inputs with supported/deferred policies, not inert strings.
Connect navigation route leases to agent trace feedback before behavior-debt retirement can pass.
Treat WorkItem dependency unlock views as deterministic scheduler inputs inside mission_transaction_work_spine's fixture slice.
Maintain the six materialized high-novelty negative cases in the matrix, taxonomy, fixture manifests, payload contract, and error-code binding contract before those mechanics are counted as covered.

Do not promote post-materialization reducer contracts such as source-shape resolution, dry-run audit matrices, or negative-case receipt assertions into ledger rows unless future runtime code/tests prove standalone pattern status.

Preserve entry-payload admission, affordance-passport selection, and authority-chain resolution as existing runtime front-door pattern contracts that strengthen current organs rather than expanding the ledger.
Bind runtime-front-door fixture materialization to existing anti-principle mirror ids and receipt fields before adding matrix rows, so future validators reuse the current doctrine failure vocabulary.
Bind code-map and blast-radius projection as a single-producer packet contract before any public renderer claims code architecture impact behavior.

Bind formal-prover policy reducers to no-solve redaction receipts, truth-side leakage classification, premise-budget policy, and zero-provider-dispatch receipts before any public proof-spine fixture claims provider evidence is safe.

Implement mission_transaction_work_spine closeout as an ordered, idempotent work_landing_reconcile_finalizer_plan state machine before treating commit hashes, clean preflight, or receipt evidence as landed work.

Bind affordance-passport selection to synthetic selector receipts: anti-trigger hits, semantic-similarity-only decoys, missing safe drilldown, and missing demotion receipts fail before route authority can pass.

Implement WorkItem entrypoint live-work routing as a synthetic mission_transaction_work_spine fixture: live WorkItem selection precedes phase context, compact cards omit private edge/event detail, and subphase_runtime_attention remains only a legacy alias of phase_runtime_context.

Prioritize the compound menu by demand-weighted impressiveness: formal_math_readiness_proof_spine_compound first, agent_trace_to_route_repair_observability_compound second, durable_agent_work_landing_replay_compound third, synthetic_science_oracle_dossier_reconciliation_compound fourth.

Treat formal_math_readiness_proof_spine_compound as partial, not absent: the public root has readiness, premise retrieval, and bounded Lean/Lake witness pieces, but still needs the integrated compound fixture before flagship completion.
Keep prediction/oracle reconciliation schema-only until a synthetic science fixture proves CP1/CP2 constraint handling without live market or private forecast authority.

Add a computer-use action trace replay fixture before any public UI-agent claim: screenshot digests, allowed actions, affordance evidence, execution diffs, validator oracles, trace grades, repair routes, and cold replay receipts must exist before screen recordings or final answers count as evidence.

Add a CI evolution skill-regression replay fixture before any public coding-agent capability claim: multi-commit repository epochs, terminal traces, CI matrix results, regression ledgers, paired skill/no-skill receipts, repair or rollback decisions, and cold replay receipts must exist before one-shot patch passes or benchmark citations count as evidence.

Add a verifiable reward agent-curriculum replay fixture before any public long-horizon agent capability claim: deterministic reward scripts, process labels, reward-hacking negatives, curriculum deltas, and cold replay receipts must exist before benchmark citations or RLVR language count as evidence.

Add an agent sandbox policy-escape replay fixture before any public agent-security claim: policy capsule, normalized requested action, allow/warn/block/review verdict, side-effect diff, approval or denial receipt, rollback, and cold replay must exist before sandbox, security, or exploit language counts as evidence.

Add a mechanistic interpretability circuit-attribution replay fixture before any public transparency claim: feature ids, attribution edges, intervention deltas, sufficiency/faithfulness checks, error-node budgets, and cold replay receipts must exist before graph screenshots or feature labels count as evidence.

Add an agent monitor red-team/falsification replay fixture before any public monitoring claim: coverage exceptions, adversarial trajectories, false-negative probes, severity routing, human escalation, privacy redaction, and mitigation receipts must exist before monitor coverage language counts as evidence.

Add a personal agent memory consent/revocation replay fixture before any public memory-agent claim: consent scopes, sensitive-field suppression, update/delete/forget decisions, revocation effects, privacy grades, and cold replay must exist before personalization counts as evidence.

Add a spatial world-model counterfactual simulation replay fixture before any public embodied/world-model claim: scene state, controls, multimodal placeholders, rare-event edits, transition diffs, fidelity limits, oracle checks, and cold replay must exist before generated worlds or videos count as evidence.

rejected_new_row_candidates.reason: The code surface is real and load-bearing, but existing rows already cover it through system_atlas_source_coupling_gate, generated projection freshness/source-coupling mechanics, and standard type-plane contracts. Add fixture evidence to those rows instead of creating a sibling.
A source-proven row already exists as authority_chain_handle_resolver. It is useful but UI-handle oriented and less central to first-wave public projection than the three strengthening targets.

The canonical architecture already lists this as a Wave 3 child-suborgan candidate; the safer improvement is to bind a minimal dependency-unlock slice into mission_transaction_work_spine while preserving the child-suborgan boundary.

runtime_front_door_anti_principle_bridge.projectable_action_now: When the runtime-front-door fixture contracts are materialized, copy these anti-principle ids and receipt fields into the matrix, taxonomy, manifest attachment, and validator plan instead of inventing new doctrine vocabulary.
runtime_front_door_anti_principle_bridge.row_guard_rule: A runtime-front-door negative case may materialize only by reusing existing anti-principle mirror ids, existing pattern rows, and synthetic fixtures; this bridge does not create anti-principles, ledger rows, public implementation files, or authority claims.

candidate_triage_rows.projection_effect: Future public entry routing should implement admission as a checked control-field floor before any context-budget trimming, so direct-action permissions and forbidden-route constraints survive first contact.

projection_hardening_needed.fixture_shape: Oversized synthetic entry packet with banned routes, route lease permitted actions, ceremony proof, surface contract, freshness/currentness handles, source-coupling status, and omission receipts; the admission reducer may trim text-heavy sections but must preserve the control-field floor.

candidate_triage_rows.projection_effect: Future public route selection should make row-owned affordance passports the authority for when to open or demote a route, with semantic similarity treated only as a hint.

projection_hardening_needed.fixture_shape: Three synthetic route rows: one strong when_to_open match, one anti-trigger match that loses despite lexical overlap, and one absent-passport row demoted; the selector emits compatibility labels and passport coverage instead of raw similarity scores.

candidate_triage_rows.projection_effect: Future public projection should reopen compressed handles through typed authority ladders before using generated projections as evidence, preserving projection-not-authority boundaries at interaction time.

projection_hardening_needed.fixture_shape: Synthetic compressed handles for principle, concept, mechanism, shard, phase, and cycle resolve into typed authority rungs with source paths and ontology links; unsupported or empty handles fail closed and emit no authority claim.

runtime_front_door_existing_pattern_swee.projectable_action_now: Bind these three fixture contracts in existing organ manifests or negative-case matrices during a future macro reducer pass; do not create public implementation files from this scout.
runtime_front_door_existing_pattern_swee.row_guard_rule: Runtime front-door mechanics found in actual code/tests strengthen existing source-proven ledger rows when the row already exists; do not append a duplicate row unless a future source-proven mechanism is absent from extracted_patterns_ledger.jsonl.

terminology_boundary.body_policy: Source refs may name governing files, standards, tests, and function anchors; no raw seed bodies, prompt bodies, provider payload bodies, operator threads, HUD/browser/cockpit live state, live ledgers, prediction material, release packets, recipient packets, website surfaces, or current public-root implementation bodies are copied.

watchlist_not_promoted.why_not_top_three: It is already routed as a root contract under executable_doctrine_grammar and is highly relevant, but the immediate mechanical build ambiguity is sharper in reference resolution, route-lease feedback, and WorkItem unlock semantics.
It is already a source pattern for navigation_hologram_route_plane and has explicit source_coupling_result receipt requirements plus negative cases.
It is already a mission_transaction_work_spine source_pattern_id with weak-edge validator assertions and receipt_drain_status fields.
